data.description: Client documentation-gap report: agents cannot cheaply tell whether a plan-review attestation is CURRENT vs the moving base ref, and coaching deep-links were dead in consumer repos. Ground-truth analysis (this session) mapped 8 items to: already-fixed-on-main, small code additions, and doc gaps. Children implement Tier1 code + Tier2 docs + Tier3 timestamp. AC: (1) rebar explain works in a consumer install; (2) a read-only, no-LLM currency query exists and is documented; (3) the idempotence short-circuit is visible in text output; (4) an attestation-lifecycle doc states the binding/invalidation rule and that audit show is a history not a status view.
data.title: Address plan-review attestation-currency doc/UX gaps (client report)
